summary: Referral Tracking Dashboard feature tested. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (GET /api/referrals/tracking, leaderboard, admin/stats all working). Frontend: Page loads correctly with all components. FIXED: Sidebar nav was missing 'Invite & Earn' due to bug in Growth section filter. Notification panel tabs (Unread/Read/All) working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 174 added referral tracking dashboard with milestone rewards. Backend endpoints: GET /api/referrals/tracking (milestones, invite_link, direct_count), GET /api/referrals/leaderboard (rank, referral_count), GET /api/referrals/admin/stats (total_members, referral_rate). Frontend: /referral-tracking page with data-testid='referral-tracking-page', 'referral-milestones', 'referral-leaderboard', 'invite-link-display'. Sidebar nav item 'Invite & Earn' added under Growth section (FIXED: was missing from section filter). Notification panel tabs (Unread/Read/All) verified working with data-testid='tab-unread', 'tab-read', 'tab-all'. Note: Leaderboard is empty (0 referrals in DB). Milestones: 1=150pts, 3=100pts, 5=200pts, 10=500pts, 25=1000pts, 50=2500pts.

get_referral_tracking.notes: Returns milestones array (6 items), invite_link, direct_count

sidebar_nav_invite_earn.notes: FIXED: Added 'referral_tracking' to Growth section filter in Sidebar.jsx line 560

notification_panel_tabs.notes: All tabs present: tab-unread (35), tab-read (4), tab-all (39)

sidebar_nav_missing.issue: 'referral_tracking' nav item was defined but not included in Growth section filter array
sidebar_nav_missing.fix: Added 'referral_tracking' to the Growth section filter array: ['habits', 'affiliate', 'referral_tracking', 'my_rewards', 'leaderboard', 'licensee_account', 'family_accounts']
